---
name: webapp-testing
description: Guidance for testing web applications including unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests
---

# Skill Instructions

## Overview
This skill provides best practices for testing Next.js web applications, covering unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests.

## When to Use
- Writing test cases for React components
- Testing API routes and backend logic
- Validating user workflows with E2E tests
- Ensuring code quality and preventing regressions

## Testing Frameworks
- **Unit/Integration**: Jest, React Testing Library
- **E2E**: Cypress, Playwright
- **API**: Jest with supertest

## Best Practices
1. Write tests alongside feature development
2. Aim for >80% code coverage
3. Use descriptive test names
4. Test user behavior, not implementation details
5. Keep tests isolated and independent
6. Mock external dependencies

## Examples
- Component testing with React Testing Library
- API route testing with Jest
- User flow testing with Cypress
